_help.confidence: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW  (LOW blocks credit strategies → NO_TRADE)
_help.vixRegime: LOW | NORMAL | HIGH | EXTREME  (EXTREME → NO_TRADE immediately)
_help.historicalVolatility: 0.0–1.0 decimal (e.g. 0.14 = 14% HV); iv/hv ratio determines IV regime
_help.dte: Calendar days to expiry; ≤ 4 → spreadWidthMin=50, > 4 → spreadWidthMax=100
_help.atmStrike: Round number nearest to spot — used for EM calc and debit spread anchor
_help.atmCallLtp: ATM straddle leg (for cross-check only; independent from calls list)
_help.atmPutLtp: ATM straddle leg (for cross-check only; independent from puts list)
_help.calls_iv: ATM call iv drives IV/HV ratio (L1 regime) and EM calculation (L2)
_help.pop: BUYER's PoP (prob ITM from Upstox); G1 uses seller's PoP = 1 − pop
_help.pop_g1_rule: set shortPut pop ≤ 0.20 for G1 pass (seller PoP ≥ 80%)
_help.delta: negative for puts (−0.20 = abs boundary); positive for calls (≤ 0.20 for credit short)
_help.null_chain: set atmStrike to null to skip L2/L3 (engine exits at NO_TRADE or SKIP)

scenarioName: 28 Jun 2026 — BULLISH MILD VIX HIGH IV RICH → expected BULL_PUT_SPREAD all gates pass

puts._comment: short put — target boundary=23517 → round to 23500; delta abs=0.16 ≤ 0.20 ✓; pop=0.16 → sellerPoP=84% ≥ 80% ✓
